articles.title: British Open TV blunder leaves golf fans fuming, Hooters Gianna hits the beach & Sophie Cunningham vs Big Tech - Fox News
articles.description: Sam Burns shot a 62 at The Open, but NBC and USA Network barely showed his round, leaving viewers stunned when he appeared on 59 watch late.
articles.content:
'Nightcaps' is a daily column that catches you up on the biggest sports, news and culture stories you may have missed while pretending to do work at your desk. It runs MondayFriday on OutKick.com.
